overall.description: A slow panoramic view of a cozy, rustic wooden cabin interior at night, rendered in a game engine. The camera pans left across a stone fireplace, kitchen area, and dining table, illuminated by warm firelight and oil lamps, gradually revealing a wooden staircase in the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin kitchen and dining corner

agents.ego_description: slowly panning gaze across the cabin interior, examining the kitchen area and the warm glow of the stone fireplace

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with active fire burning inside, central feature of the room
long wooden dining table with food items including a roasted bird and bowls
green wooden wall cabinets and counter on the right side of the room
black cast iron stove or oven unit below the kitchen cabinets
copper pots and pans suspended from chains on the ceiling
neatly stacked firewood to the right of the fireplace
pile of orange pumpkins and gourds to the left of the fireplace
lit oil lamp on the kitchen counter providing warm light
multi-paned windows on the left wall showing dark night outside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cozy, fire-lit cabin interior with focus on the kitchen area to the right. A stone fireplace burns brightly in the center, illuminating a wooden dining table in the foreground. Copper cookware hangs from the ceiling chains, and pumpkins sit stacked near the hearth, creating an autumnal atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: central living area with fireplace and emerging staircase view

events.description: wooden staircase becomes visible in the far left corner as the camera continues panning left

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left across the room, shifting focus from the kitchen toward the staircase corner

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with railings leading to an upper level, partially visible in the corner

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, the fireplace becomes centered in the view while the kitchen area shifts toward the right edge of the frame. The wooden staircase gradually emerges into view on the left side, revealing the cabin's second level access. The warm firelight continues to dominate the lighting atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin living area with prominent staircase

events.description: kitchen cabinets and stove exit the frame right as view focuses on the staircase and left wall

agents.ego_description: completing the leftward pan to focus on the staircase and left corner of the cabin

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its pan to focus on the left side of the cabin, where the wooden staircase is now prominently visible. The kitchen area has exited the frame, while the stone fireplace shifts to the right side. The windows on the left wall and the staircase dominate the final view, maintaining the warm, fire-lit ambiance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan across a rustic cabin interior, shifting focus from a cozy kitchen area to a wooden staircase. It begins with a view of the kitchen to the right, where copper cookware hangs from the ceiling and pumpkins are stacked near a brightly burning stone fireplace that illuminates a foreground dining table. As the camera glides left, the fireplace moves to the center of the frame while the wooden staircase gradually emerges from the periphery to reveal access to the second level. The scene then shifts further until the kitchen exits the frame and the fireplace moves to the right, finally centering on the staircase and the windows of the left wall under a consistent, warm fire-lit glow.
